workflowId.cachedResultName: generate starting frames and clips prompts - paralleling

value.previousTextPart: ={{ $json.partIndex > 0 ? $('Define Visuals Duration(normalized) and Text Part').first().json.parts[$json.partIndex-1].text : '[No previous text part! This is a first request.]' }}
value.nextTextPart: ={{ $json.partIndex < $('Define Visuals Duration(normalized) and Text Part').first().json.parts.length-1 ? $('Define Visuals Duration(normalized) and Text Part').first().json.parts[$json.partIndex+1].text : '[No next text part! This is a last request.]'  }}
